scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=@leadthur/shared && npm run build --workspace=@leadthur/backend && npm run build --workspace=@leadthur/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --workspace=@leadthur/shared && npm run build --workspace=@leadthur/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@leadthur/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=@leadthur/backend
